metadata.title: Mixmoments — Mix Your Songs Into One Track for Any Event
metadata.description: Turn your MP3s into one seamless mix for any event — trim, reorder, and fade tracks right in your browser. Nothing uploads. Free for up to 10 songs.
metadata.keywords: playlist builder,mp3 merger,event playlist,wedding playlist,party music mixer,audio editor online,merge mp3,fade transition,trim audio,browser mp3 tool
metadata.ogDescription: Trim, reorder, and fade your own songs into one clean MP3 — right in your browser, nothing uploads.

app.pageSubtitle: Load songs, set trim points, configure fades, export as one MP3. (Max {limit} songs)
app.arrangePlaceholder: Add songs above to reorder, trim, and set fades

dropZone.label: Drop your MP3 files here
dropZone.sub: or click to browse · any event, any occasion · files stay in your browser

survey.title: What are you using Mixmoments for?
survey.feedbackLabel: Anything you wish the app could do?
survey.placeholder: Your feedback shapes what we build next...
survey.thankYou: Thank you — your feedback shapes what we build next.

upgrade.title: You've hit the free limit
upgrade.subtitle: Free plan supports up to 5 songs. Unlock unlimited exports for any event — parties, weddings, festivals, corporate — with a one-time payment.
upgrade.footer: Secure payment via Stripe · No subscription · Cancel anytime isn't needed — it's yours forever

hero.heading: One mix, every
hero.sub: Drop in your MP3s, arrange them, trim and fade each one, and export a single clean track — built for weddings, parties, birthdays, or whatever's next. Nothing ever leaves your browser.
hero.microcopy: Free for up to 10 songs · No install · No sign-up to try
hero.mockSong2: 02 — I Gotta Feeling – The Black Eyed Peas.mp3

useCases.heading: Built for real moments, not just files
useCases.sub: Wherever the day calls for a soundtrack, Mixmoments handles the mixing so you don't have to fight software for it.

items.title: Weddings
items.desc: A ceremony track and a separate reception mix, without hiring a DJ.

items.title: Birthday parties
items.desc: Build the exact vibe for the room, start to finish, in one file.

items.title: Podcasts & intros
items.desc: Splice intro, outro, and segments into one clean export.

items.title: DJ sets for non-DJs
items.desc: Trim and fade like a pro, without learning DJ software.

items.title: Nothing uploads
items.desc: Every file is processed locally in your browser. It never touches a server.

items.title: No software to learn
items.desc: No DAW, no timeline, no menus. Just your songs, trimmed and in order.

items.title: One clean file out
items.desc: A single MP3, faded and merged, ready to play anywhere.

story.p1: I built the first version of this for my own wedding. We had a tight budget, so a lot of things were DIY — including the music. I needed one track for the ceremony and a different one for the reception, and ended up fighting with an audio editor at 1am the night before just to get the fades right.
story.p2: It worked out, but it shouldn't take that much effort. So I built the tool I wished existed — and it turns out the same problem shows up for parties, birthdays, and pretty much any moment that needs its own soundtrack.
story.signature: — a groom who was more stressed about the fades than the vows

steps.title: Drop your MP3s in
steps.desc: Drag and drop or browse for files. Everything decodes right in your browser.

steps.title: Order, trim, fade
steps.desc: Reorder tracks, set trim points on a waveform, add fade-outs per song.

steps.title: Download one MP3
steps.desc: Everything merges, resamples, and encodes into a single downloadable file.

pricing.heading: Free to try, one payment to keep

finalCta.heading: Your next moment deserves its own mix.
finalCta.sub: No install, no sign-up required to try, nothing ever leaves your browser.

landing.footer: © 2026 Mixmoments — files stay in your browser, nothing is uploaded.
